overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player passes street protesters holding signs, walks under neon-lit overpasses, and approaches a massive red torii gate with a large multi-armed statue. The environment features a blend of futuristic cyberpunk architecture with Japanese-inspired elements and bright neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with protesters and tree planter

events.description: begins walking forward past the two protesters holding signs

agents.ego_description: initially observing the protesters then walking past them along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: two protesters holding a cardboard sign reading THE END IS NEAR

entered.detail: large tree with thick trunk in a bright blue rectangular planter box
two individuals standing on the sidewalk holding a protest sign
vertical neon sign with HOTEL text on building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunny street corner where two protesters stand holding a sign reading THE END IS NEAR next to a large tree in a blue planter. The camera holder begins walking forward past them, revealing a neon-lit urban environment with a prominent HOTEL sign visible in the background.

events.description: turns left and enters the covered area beneath the overpass with red and green neon lighting
exits the covered overpass back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: turning left to walk under the overpass structure, transitioning from open street to covered walkway

entered.detail: concrete overpass with distinctive red and green neon tube lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and moves under a massive overpass illuminated by red and green neon lights, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere. After passing through the covered area, the scene transitions back to bright daylight as the TENGU building comes into view on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide downtown commercial sidewalk with steam vents

events.description: steam becomes visible rising from vents along the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide sidewalk passing various pedestrians and concrete benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on a blue illuminated bench

entered.detail: tall building with large pink neon TENGU signage and distinctive red horizontal stripes
white steam rising from ground vents creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide sunlit sidewalk with the prominent TENGU building rising on the right, characterized by its red stripes and bright pink signage. Steam rises from street vents in the distance, and various pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the busy commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to torii gate landmark with increasing building density

events.description: the large red torii gate becomes prominently visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distinctive red torii gate with other pedestrians moving in the same direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking ahead toward the gate

entered.detail: massive traditional Japanese red torii gate spanning across the street ahead
large dark statue with multiple arms visible behind the torii gate

segments.scene_description: The street narrows as the camera approaches a massive red torii gate that dominates the view ahead, with a large multi-armed statue visible behind it. Steam vents release white clouds on the left side as pedestrians walk toward this prominent landmark.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with torii gate and subway entrance

events.description: passes under the red torii gate into the open intersection area
yellow taxi and other vehicles drive through the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through the torii gate and observing the large statue and surrounding intersection traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving through the intersection in front of the statue

entered.detail: stairs leading down into the subway system located beneath the large statue

segments.scene_description: Passing through the massive red torii gate, the scene opens into a busy intersection with the multi-armed statue towering overhead and a subway entrance below. Vehicles including a yellow taxi drive through the crosswalk as the camera explores the area around this iconic landmark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a bustling downtown district that transitions from a sunny street corner into a monumental Japanese-inspired plaza. It begins by passing protesters holding a sign beside a blue planter, moving forward to reveal a neon-lit urban landscape with a prominent hotel sign. The camera then turns left to glide under a massive overpass illuminated by red and green neon lights before emerging back into bright daylight beside the red-striped Tengu building. As the camera continues along a wide sidewalk filled with pedestrians and rising steam, the street narrows and leads directly toward a massive red torii gate. Finally, the movement passes through the gate to open into a busy intersection where a towering multi-armed statue looms over a subway entrance and passing yellow taxis.
